title: Update cannot clear a field or set year to 0
evidence: app.go:253-271 updateBook only overwrites a field when req value is non-empty/non-zero, so PUT can never blank title/author/isbn or set year=0
suggestion: Use pointer fields (*string/*int) in UpdateBookRequest to distinguish 'omitted' from 'set to empty/zero'

title: Hard-coded SQLite filename and package-global db handle
evidence: app.go:42 dbFile := "books.db" and app.go:39 var db *sql.DB — server DB path is not configurable and state is package-global
suggestion: Make the DB path configurable via env var and inject the *sql.DB instead of a global

title: Error-path test coverage exceeds the 3-test minimum
evidence: app_test.go — 10 tests including 404/400 cases for get/update/delete plus missing-title, missing-author, empty-body, and empty-list; no t.Skip present
suggestion: None — coverage of error paths is a strength (spec required only 3 tests)

title: Low idiomatic score despite high code quality
evidence: scores.json idiomatic=0.45 vs code_quality=0.956; uses fmt.Sscanf for id parsing (app.go:190) rather than strconv.Atoi
suggestion: Prefer strconv.Atoi for id parsing and idiomatic Go error handling patterns
